2603.16783.title: SpokenUS: A Spoken User Simulator for Task-Oriented Dialogue
2603.16783.paper_summary: Robust task-oriented spoken dialogue agents require exposure to the full diversity of how people interact through speech. Building spoken user simulators that address this requires large-scale spoken task-oriented dialogue (TOD) data encompassing spoken user behaviors, yet existing datasets are limited in scale and domain coverage, with no systematic pipeline for augmenting them. To address this, we introduce \textbf{SpokenTOD}, a spoken TOD dataset of 52,390 dialogues and 1,034 hours of speech augmented with four spoken user behaviors -- cross-turn slots, barge-in, disfluency, and emotional prosody -- across diverse speakers and domains. Building on SpokenTOD, we present \textbf{SpokenUS}, a spoken user simulator grounded in TOD with a dedicated architecture for barge-in. SpokenUS achieves comparable goal coverage to significantly larger models while substantially outperforming all baselines in Human MOS, disclosing slot values gradually across the dialogue as humans do rather than front-loading them. Further analysis confirms that SpokenUS's spoken behaviors pose meaningful challenges to downstream agents, making it a practical tool for training and evaluating more robust spoken dialogue systems.
2603.16783.paper_summary_zh: 穩健的任務導向口語對話代理需要接觸到人們通過語音互動的全方位多樣性。建立能夠解決這一需求的口語用戶模擬器需要大規模的口語任務導向對話（TOD）數據，涵蓋口語用戶行為，但現有數據集在規模和領域覆蓋方面有限，且缺乏系統化的增強管道。為了解決這個問題，我們介紹了\textbf{SpokenTOD}，這是一個包含52,390段對話和1,034小時語音的口語TOD數據集，增強了四種口語用戶行為——跨回合槽位、插話、不流暢性和情感韻律——涵蓋多樣的講者和領域。在SpokenTOD的基礎上，我們提出了\textbf{SpokenUS}，這是一個基於TOD的口語用戶模擬器，具有專門的插話架構。SpokenUS在目標覆蓋率上達到了與顯著更大模型相當的水平，同時在人工MOS評估中顯著超越所有基準，逐步在對話中揭示槽位值，與人類的表現相符，而不是提前揭示。進一步的分析確認，SpokenUS的口語行為對下游代理構成了有意義的挑戰，使其成為訓練和評估更穩健的口語對話系統的實用工具。
2603.16783.author: Jonggeun Lee et.al.
2603.16783.authors: Jonggeun Lee, Junseong Pyo, Jeongmin Park, Yohan Jo
